name: Chocolate Turtle Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup KRAFT Caramel Flavored Dessert Topping
1 prepared graham cracker crumb crust (6 oz.)
1 pkg. Chocolate Fudge Flavor Instant Pudding (8-serving size)
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread caramel topping onto bottom of crust. Refrigerate.
2. Pour cold milk into a large bowl. Add pudding mix. Beat with wire whisk for 1 minute.
3. Pour mixture at once into crust.
4. Refrigerate for 2 hours.
5. Garnish with whipped topping. Sprinkle with additional chopped pecans and drizzle with additional caramel topping, if desired. Store leftover pie in refrigerator. Makes 8 servings.
